arts.ttl: 'He is ready' - Ruben Amorim makes Leny Yoro admission and explains Man United rotation policy
arts.sum: Summer signing Leny Yoro is in line to make his full debut for Man United against Nottingham Forest on Saturday teatime.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe admits Man Utd are MEDIOCRE as chief promises 'unpopular' decisions
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has given a frank interview on the state of Manchester United, while the billionaire co-owner has also responded to criticism after he decided to increase ticket prices

arts.ttl: Rico Lewis red card gives Man City derby headache for Manchester United clash
arts.sum: Lewis was sent off in Saturday's game against Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Ratcliffe blasts 'MEDIOCRE' Man Utd in bombshell interview
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe has heavily criticised the state of the club in an eyebrow-raising interview. Ratcliffe blasts 'mediocre' Man Utd

arts.ttl: USA wonderkid ‘set to train’ at Manchester United next week ahead of possible transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United appear set to host the 16-year-old, who has impressed onlookers in the USA, throughout next week.

arts.ttl: Team News: Leny Yoro decision made as Man United head coach Ruben Amorim names XI for Nottingham Forest clash
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim names his Red Devils XI for Saturday's Premier League clash against Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe names two unexpected attributes to praise Man United head coach Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has been talking about his decision to appoint Ruben Amorim as the new head coach at Man Utd.

arts.sum: Some of the world's biggest clubs are after him!
